issue_title: Packages component breaks if a customer is deleted
issue_body_preview: If a package is packed for a customer, then the customer is deleted, when you go to the packages page it will not load the list of Packed Packages and the console indicates **TypeError: Cannot read property '_id' of undefined**.  The error happens in [this line](https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/pantr
test_description_zh:
1. 为某位客户打包一个包裹（Package），确认打包成功。
2. 删除该客户。
3. 导航到 Packages（包裹）页面，查看已打包包裹列表是否正常加载。
expected_result_zh: Packages 页面应正常加载并显示已打包包裹列表，不会出现页面空白或加载失败的情况。即使关联的客户已被删除，列表仍能正确渲染，控制台不应出现 TypeError 错误。
